table.column: , 84809, After all functions are compiled and linked into a single design
, , After user unroll and inline pragmas are applied
(1) unroll, 472659 *, user unroll pragmas are applied
(2) simplification, 224778 *, simplification of applied user unroll pragmas
(3) inline, 202638 *, user inline pragmas are applied
(4) simplification, 190199 *, simplification of applied user inline pragmas
, , After user array partition and struct aggregate/disaggregate pragmas are applied
(1) array partition, 4956384 *, user array partition pragmas are applied
(2) simplification, 170672 *, simplification of applied user array partition & struct aggregate/disaggregate pragmas
(3) aggregate/disaggregate , 170672 *, user struct aggregate/disaggregate pragmas are applied
(4) array reshape, 171205 *, apply array reshape pragmas
(5) access patterns, 170514 *, array access pattern optmizations
, , After transformations are applied to meet performance pragma targets
(1) loop simplification, 168530 *, loop and instruction simplification
(2) parallelization, 168396 *, loops are unrolled or pipelined to meet performance targets
(3) array partition, 164028 *, arrays are partitioned to meet performance targets
(4) simplification, 164028 *, simplification of design after performance transformations
, , After hardware transfomations
(1) lowering, 166771 *, initial conversion to HW specific instructions
(2) optimizations, 165852 *, high level synthesis optimizations

item.name: Instructions per Function for each Compilation Phase

row.col0: linear<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, ap_fixed<10, 1, AP_RND_CONV, AP_SAT, 0>, linear_config2>

note.desc: Exceeded design size warning message threshold

table.column: 100000, Show a warning when total design instructions exceeds this value
